title: modeled field layout
text: modeled field layout A reusabledevelopment object that defines a value for the Field Layout property. Modeled fields and component fields can reference the modeled field interface in their Field Layout property, which then inherits any changes that are subsequently made to it. Synonyms: field layout template (pre-Uniface 10) Related Links Modeled Properties Modeled properties are development objects that can be reused in selected properties to enforce consistent patterns for storing, entering, and displaying data. You model properties for the Database Interface, Field Syntax, and Field Layout properties. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
